🎂 Birthday Quest 🎂

Greha 💗

Memory Game 🧠

Match all pairs to unlock the next slide 🔒

Blow the Candle 🎂

Tap the candle to blow it out 🔒

🕯️

💗 For Jimi 💗

Happy Birthday "Darling Darkness" 🎂🔪.

You are not merely beautiful — you are rare. Exquisite in ways this dull world barely deserves 🌹.

What sets you apart isn’t just your face… it’s your nature. Soft yet strong. Gentle yet protective. Sweet… but never weak 🤍.

Let the shadows keep their distance; they know better than to touch something that belongs to me.

And as for those "evil eyes"? Let them look. I’d love to watch them shatter when they realize they’re staring at something far more dangerous than themselves. 👁️‍🗨️

I’ve saved a special vintage for tonight—something as dark and intoxicating as your spirit. Raise a glass, Sasli. The world is yours for the taking, and if anyone dares to stand in your way... well, they’ll have to answer to me. 🔱 😏

Forever yours, Lucifer 🕯️🔱

Haju Thodu baaki che.

Answer the Question to unlock the surprise 🎁

According to me, what is your name?

Open the box… and let the shadows whisper your surprise 🎁

Tap the Box to open it out 🔒

🎁

💗 For Jimi 💗

Tap the image to flip

🌸 Your smile and hair.. ufff just....🫶.
🐰 Sasli but with attitude.
✨ Every day with you is a blessing.

🎧 Final Task 🎧

Listen to this audio completely to unlock the final surprise 💖

🎊 Surprise Unlocked 🎊

You listened till the end 🥹💖

That means you deserve this…

🎁 Final Surprise 🎁

A little Present for you chakli🎀✨
